name: translate_text
description: Translates a block of text from one language to another using a neural machine translation engine.

text.description: The text content to translate. Maximum 5000 characters per request.

to_language.description: Target language as an ISO 639-1 code, e.g. 'es', 'fr', 'de', 'zh', 'ja'.

from_language.description: Source language code. Use 'auto' for automatic detection. Defaults to 'auto'.

preserve_formatting.description: Preserve line breaks and basic Markdown formatting in the output. Defaults to true.
